name: futures-debate-team
description: Multi-role futures trading debate team v4.5.6 — 铁律4条强化(8必含字段+bull/bear强制非空)+phase3适配器修复(论据自动生成+list格式兼容)+报告生成前核验前置。

displayDescription.en: 10-role futures debate team v4.4 — All 25 optimization items completed: decision determinism (--seed+hard threshold+fingerprint), backtest expansion (600d+multi-symbol+stress test+permutation+lookahead), sentiment stability (4-layer fallback+health check), memory conflict fix (independent files+SQLite+validation), L5 feedback upgrade (Shapley+argument DB), debate restructuring (3-round structured debate+evidence weighting), memory architecture upgrade (3-tier+RAG+negative sample), protocol compatibility (Pydantic v2+schema_version), ML iteration (incremental training+4-way ensemble), local risk events (PBOC/PMI/CPI), DAG fault tolerance (retry+fallback+monitor), 3-mode environment switching, regime classifier, L6 portfolio risk (concentration+drawdown fuse+veto), execution engine, ops monitoring, distributed deployment (Celery), compliance audit (hash chain), secret management (.gitignore+example), project standards (pyproject.toml), MARL trainer, market game agent, auto factor mining, multi-timeframe debate, dual-judge checks-and-balances.
displayDescription.zh: 10角色期货辩论专家团v4.4：全量优化计划25项完成。P0决策确定性+回测加固+情感因子稳定+记忆冲突修复+L5反馈升级+辩论重构+记忆升级；P1协议兼容+ML迭代+本土风控+DAG容错+环境切换+区制分流+L6组合风控；P2实盘执行引擎+运维告警+分布式部署+合规审计+密钥管理+工程规范；P3 MARL+对手盘建模+自动因子挖掘+多周期辩论+双判官制衡。数技源→链证源→研究员(含特征注入)→辩手(含三轮质证+证据加权)→策执远(净盈亏比)→风控明(6层+L6组合)→双判官(分歧阈值)→明鉴秋汇总。
